items.name: Waystaff
items.description: A resonance-crystal translator staff — pale crystal nodes set along dark wood, tuned to catch and carry the old frequencies. In steady hands it steadies a cast; in the right company it begins to do more than carry.

evolution.note: The Waystaff wakes through Aevi. Each stage gates on BOTH her bond band AND how often you've channeled a cast through her via the staff (item×companion co-activation, tracked in the practice ledger under the namespaced pairKey waystaff+aevi). The staff is an instrument at first; through her integration it becomes an answer. Stage forms are narrative + a small escalating focus bonus; the GM narrates the waking, the engine gates it. Lore canon: this is the framework's given-and-received circuit made an object — the staff answers because attention ran through it both ways.

stages.name: The Instrument
stages.description: A well-made translator staff. It carries what you send and returns what it catches, faithfully and no more.
stages.narrationHints: Cool crystal, a faint steady hum under the hand. It does exactly what a good instrument does — and waits.

stages.name: The Staff That Anticipates
stages.description: The crystal warms a half-beat before you ask. Aevi's motes have learned to gather at the upper nodes, and between them the staff starts to lean toward what you mean — resonance and radiant work through it come easier, steadier, surer.
stages.grant: Casts channeled through the Waystaff with Aevi present gain a small steadiness bonus (reduced backlash risk on resonance/radiant work).
stages.narrationHints: The nodes brighten before the word is finished. Aevi condenses along the shaft, and the staff answers the intention, not just the instruction.

stages.name: The Staff That Answers
stages.description: Aevi and the Waystaff have integrated — the Kindled Chorus running the crystal-lattice as easily as her own field. It speaks now, faintly, in the old resonance-tongue: casts made together carry further and land truer, and once in a great while the staff offers something back you did not ask for and needed.
stages.grant: Casts with Aevi through the Waystaff reach further and hold longer; once per scene the staff may surface a true reading or a needed warning on its own (GM-offered, engine-gated — never a mechanical guarantee).
stages.narrationHints: The crystal is lit from inside now, warm as a held hand. Aevi and the staff are hard to tell apart mid-cast — two things that used to be separate, answering as one. Old, and less alone than before.

items.substrateNote: Pale crystal nodes tuned to catch and carry the old frequencies — the staff holds a working charge wherever it is carried. Named in carriedSubstrate's own docstring as the exemplar.
